# Certta DevHub

## Home

- [Caf Dev Hub](https://docs.caf.io/caf-dev-hub.md): Bem vindo ao Caf Dev Hub. Explore nossos guias, documentações de API e SDK e comece.

## Product guides

- [Overview](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/readme.md)
- [User Onboarding](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/our-solutions/user-onboarding.md)
- [ID Document Verification](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/our-solutions/id-document-verification.md)
- [Know Your Customer - KYC](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/our-solutions/kyc.md)
- [Know Your Business - KYB](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/our-solutions/kyb.md)
- [Account Takeover Prevention](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/our-solutions/smart-auth.md)
- [Trust Platform](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform.md)
- [New Query](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/new-query.md)
- [Executions](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/executions.md)
- [Company](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/company.md)
- [Onboarding List](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/onboarding-list.md)
- [Onboarding Builder](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/onboarding-builder.md)
- [Query Templates](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/query-templates.md)
- [Workflow Builder](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/workflow-builder.md)
- [SSO Configuration](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/sso-configurations.md): Configure Single Sign-On (SSO) for Trust users.
- [Microsoft Entra ID (SAML)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/sso-configurations/microsoft-entra-id.md): Configure SSO with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) using the SAML protocol.
- [Okta (SAML / OIDC)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/sso-configurations/okta.md): Configure SSO with Okta using SAML or OIDC protocols.
- [Auth0 (SAML / OIDC)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/sso-configurations/auth0.md): Configure SSO with Auth0 using SAML or OIDC protocols.
- [Google Workspace (SAML)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/sso-configurations/google.md): Configure SSO with Google Workspace using SAML protocol.
- [Generic Provider (SAML / OIDC)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/trust-platform/sso-configurations/generic.md): Configure SSO with any SAML or OIDC compatible provider.
- [Smart Auth (identity)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/smart-auth.md): On this page, you will find information about the Smart Auth SDK.
- [Getting Started](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/smart-auth/getting-started.md)
- [Access Token](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/smart-auth/access-token.md)
- [Checking the Response](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/smart-auth/checking-the-response.md)
- [Resolution 6](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6.md): All.id is a distributed network built upon a peer-to-peer protocol using DLT concepts for storing and processing digital identity data.
- [All.id components](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/all.id-components.md)
- [Peer components](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/peer-components.md)
- [Facial biometrics](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/facial-biometrics.md)
- [Features](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/facial-biometrics/features.md)
- [Core procedure](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/facial-biometrics/core-procedure.md)
- [Profile insertion](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/facial-biometrics/core-procedure/profile-insertion.md)
- [Biometric validation](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/user-guide/resolution-6/facial-biometrics/core-procedure/biometric-validation.md)
- [Onboarding Journey](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboarding-journey.md)
- [Company Search through API](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/company-search-through-api.md)
- [Onboarding links into WebView and iFrame](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration.md)
- [WebView](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/webview.md): This document provides guidelines for configuring WebView to ensure proper functionality of web Onboarding integrations.
- [Android](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/webview/webview_android.md): This document provides instructions to create a WebView into an Android project.
- [iOS](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/webview/webview_ios.md): This document provides instructions to create a WebView into an iOS project.
- [React Native](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/webview/webview_react_native.md): This document provides instructions to create a WebView using React Native.
- [Flutter](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/webview/webview_flutter.md): This document provides instructions to create a WebView using Flutter.
- [iFrame](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/iframe.md): This document provides instructions for integrating the Onboarding process into an iFrame.
- [Events](https://docs.caf.io/caf-docs/quick-start-guides/onboardings-integration/events.md): This document explains how to handle events emitted by the onboarding process using window.postMessage().

## APIs

- [Overview](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/readme.md): Welcome to the API documentation! On this page, you will find everything you need to know to improve the security and quality of your apps using our API.

- [Webhooks](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/core-api/webhooks.md)
- [Transaction](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/core-api/webhooks/transaction.md): Transaction webhooks are used to communicate transaction status updates to the client-server.
- [Profile](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/core-api/webhooks/profile.md): Profile webhooks are used to communicate profile status updates to the client-server.
- [Face authentication](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/core-api/webhooks/face-authentication.md): Face authentication webhooks are used to communicate authentication to the client-server.
- [Authentication (deprecated)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/mobile-api-deprecated/authentication.md): Authenticate the Mobile API with your access key to use the available resources.
- [Available resources (deprecated)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/mobile-api-deprecated/available-resources.md)

- [Available Resources](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/all-id/available-resources.md)
- [Legacy Joint Resolution 6 Documentation](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api.md)
- [Authentication](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/authentication.md)
- [Using mTLS](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/using-mtls.md)
- [Available resources](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/available-resources.md)
- [Suspected fraud creation](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/available-resources/suspected-fraud-creation.md)
- [Suspected fraud query](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/available-resources/suspected-fraud-query.md)
- [Suspected fraud update](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/available-resources/suspected-fraud-update.md)
- [Suspected fraud deletion](https://docs.caf.io/caf-api/joint-resolution-6-api/available-resources/suspected-fraud-deletion.md)

## SDKs

- [Overview](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/readme.md)
- [Authentication](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/authentication.md)
- [Installation Guide](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/installation-guide.md): Install and configure Certta for Android. Learn SDK requirements, permissions, repositories, dependencies, session setup, runtime token updates, and color theming.
- [Face Liveness](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/getting-started-with-the-sdk.md): Install and launch Face Liveness for Android. Learn prerequisites, LivenessConfiguration options, callback events, success and failure results, and error handling.
- [Handling Failures](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/getting-started-with-the-sdk/handling-failures.md): Reference for Android Face Liveness failure handling. Learn LivenessFailure types, cause values, provider-specific errors, and how to map failures to clear user guidance.
- [Document Detector](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/document-detector.md): Install and launch Document Detector for Android. Learn configuration options, UI setup, customization paths, callback events, and result handling.
- [UI Customizations](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/document-detector/ui-customizations.md): Customize Document Detector for Android. Learn how to configure document selection, guidance screens, previews, uploads, retry states, and in-flow messages.
- [Changelog](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/changelog.md): Android SDK release notes. Track versions, breaking changes, dependency updates, provider changes, fixes, and migration notes for Face Liveness and Document Detector.
- [Legacy Getting Started with the SDK](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/getting-started-with-the-sdk-1.md)
- [Standalone Modules](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules.md)
- [Smart Auth](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth.md): Enables you to integrate live facial verification and fingerprint authentication technology into your Android applications, offering a seamless and secure way to authenticate users.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/release-notes.md)
- [Current Version](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/current-version.md)
- [Requirements](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/requirements.md)
- [Gradle Dependencies](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/gradle.md)
- [Gradle Source Code](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/gradle-code.md)
- [Permissions](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/permissions.md)
- [SDK Lifecycle](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/lifecycle.md)
- [Building the SDK](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/builder.md)
- [Start Smart Authentication](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/start-sdk.md)
- [Source Code](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/source-code.md)
- [References](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/references.md)
- [FAQ](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/cafsmartauth/faq.md)
- [CafSDK](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/readme2.md)
- [Document Detector (DEPRECATED)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector.md): Capture authentic, high-quality photos of user-submitted documents, allowing you to send them later for analysis in our API.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/release-notes.md)
- [Current Version](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/current-version.md)

- [Customization](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/builder/customization.md): Learn how to customize our SDK and make it look like your app.
- [Security Settings](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/builder/security.md)
- [Detection Steps](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/builder/steps.md)

- [Proxy configuration](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/builder/advanced-settings/proxy-settings.md)
- [Preview configuration](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/builder/advanced-settings/preview-settings.md): This page explains the possible settings for displaying the capture preview screen.
- [Start Document Detection](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/start-sdk.md)
- [Source Code](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/source-code.md)
- [Google security form](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/google-security-form.md)
- [Reduce SDKs size](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/reduce-sdks-size.md): This page presents some elements that will reduce the size of the SDKs.
- [SDKs response](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/document-detector/sdks-response.md)

- [Face Liveness (DEPRECATED)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/caffaceliveness.md): Enables you to integrate live facial verification and fingerprint authentication technology into your Android applications, offering a seamless and secure way to authenticate users.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/caffaceliveness/release-notes.md)

- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/faceauthenticator/release-notes.md)
- [Face Liveness Lite](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/caffacelivenesslite.md): Lightweight face liveness verification SDK for Android. Provides a streamlined flow to verify that a captured face is live, with simple integration and minimal footprint.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/caffacelivenesslite/release-notes.md)
- [Current Version](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/caffacelivenesslite/current-version.md)

- [Face Liveness (DEPRECATED)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/faceliveness.md): Enables you to integrate live facial verification and fingerprint authentication technology into your Android applications, offering a seamless and secure way to authenticate users.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/faceliveness/release-notes.md)
- [Deprecated SDKs](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/deprecated-sdks.md)
- [DocumentDetector v7 or below (Deprecated)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/deprecated-sdks/document-detector-deprecated.md)
- [PassiveFaceLiveness (Deprecated)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/deprecated-sdks/passivefaceliveness-deprecated.md): Smart camera that captures a reliable selfie of your user using artificial intelligence, capable of detecting and disapproving snapshots and recordings. Ideal for your onboarding.
- [FaceAuthenticator (Deprecated)](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/deprecated-sdks/faceauthenticator-deprecated.md): Facematch with proof of life from the user of your app, ideal for login flows or valuable financial transactions.
- [Old Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/android/standalone-modules/deprecated-sdks/release-notes.md)

- [Face Liveness](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/ios/getting-started-with-the-sdk-1.md): Install and configure Face Liveness for iOS with CafSDK's. Learn requirements, session setup, face liveness flow, UI configuration, delegates, theming, and support.
- [Handling Failures](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/ios/getting-started-with-the-sdk-1/handling-failures.md): Reference for Certta Liveness delegate events, blocking errors, and failure mapping on iOS, including success handling, diagnostics, and UI guidance.
- [Document Detector](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/ios/getting-started-with-the-sdk-2.md): Install and configure Document Detector for iOS with Certta and CafSDK. Learn requirements, session setup, document capture flow, UI configuration, delegates, theming, and support.

- [Standalone Modules](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/flutter/standalone-modules.md)
- [Document Detector](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/flutter/standalone-modules/documentdetector.md): The Document Detector SDK allows seamless document capture and verification, enabling you to integrate advanced document detection capabilities into your applications.
- [Release Notes](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/flutter/standalone-modules/documentdetector/release-notes.md)

- [Face Liveness](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/flutter/standalone-modules/faceliveness.md): Enables you to integrate live facial liveness detection technology into your Android and iOS applications, offering a seamless and secure way to verify users.
- [Requirements](https://docs.caf.io/caf-sdk/flutter/standalone-modules/faceliveness/requirements.md)

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.caf.io/caf-dev-hub.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
